description: The region of outer space near Earth, including the magnetosphere, radiation belts, and the region influenced by Earth's magnetic field. Sits between the Exosphere and interplanetary space.

contents.name: magnetosphereExtentKm
contents.description: Approximate extent of Earth's magnetosphere on the sunward side in kilometres.

contents.name: hasVanAllenBelts
contents.description: Indicates the presence of Van Allen radiation belts within Geospace.

contents.name: isPartOf
contents.description: Geospace is part of the broader Universe.

contents.name: encompasses
contents.description: Geospace encompasses Earth and its surrounding atmospheric layers.
